message.content:
NO CARDS. The image shows a minimalistic webpage with the following visible elements:  
- Top text: "CREATIVE TOOLS HUB" (small, centered, dark gray)  
- Below that: "MODULE-05" (smaller, centered, light gray)  
- Main heading: "Built for Founders & Creatives" (centered, "Built for Founders" in dark gray, "& Creatives" in orange)  
- Subheading: "Free, browser-based creative and business tools. Use free tools, upgrade for full business support." (centered, light gray)  
- An orange rectangular button with white text: "ACCESS ALL TOOLS" and a right-facing arrow icon (centered at the bottom third of the page)  
- The background is a solid light beige/cream color. No tool cards, icons, or grid of cards are present.
